name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: Lake View, IA's Farmers State Bank at 401 Main St is a community bank branch offering local banking and financial services.
description_long:
Farmers State Bank operates a branch location at 401 Main St in Lake View, IA. This standalone branch serves as a full-service banking facility for residents of Lake View and the surrounding community, providing a convenient location for everyday financial needs.

The Lake View branch offers standard banking services including deposits, withdrawals, loans, and financial consultation. For specific information about services available at this Lake View location and appointment scheduling, contact the branch directly.

Lake View residents can visit this Farmers State Bank location for their banking needs. Bring valid ID and account information when visiting. As a community-focused bank, Farmers State Bank is committed to serving local customers with personalized service.
services: Online banking login and account access
Savings accounts with variable product options
FSB Club membership for ages 50+ with $500 minimum balance
Monthly interest payments on eligible accounts
USA PATRIOT Act Section 326 identity verification for accounts
Password reset and account recovery services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full U.S. Government faith and credit
FSB Club membership offers free checks and monthly interest payments for customers 50+
Secure online banking platform available for account management and transactions
Local community bank with physical branch at 401 Main Street, Lake View, Iowa
Personalized account opening with identity verification to prevent fraud
Auto loan products available with direct relationship banking approach
Multiple contact methods: phone (712-657-8525) and in-person branch access
cons: Limited geographic service area—appears to serve primarily Lake View, Iowa region only
Minimal website content with no published interest rates, fees, or product details
Narrow product range visible—no mention of checking accounts, mortgages, credit cards, or business lending
No evidence of mobile app, advanced digital banking features, or ATM network information
FSB Club membership has $500 minimum balance requirement, excluding lower-balance savers
best_for: Lake View, Iowa residents seeking local community banking relationships
Adults 50 and older interested in savings accounts with monthly interest and free checks
Auto loan borrowers preferring personal service and local decision-making
Depositors prioritizing FDIC insurance and traditional bank stability
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank Lake View is best suited for rural Iowa residents and customers aged 50+ seeking traditional community banking with FDIC protection and personal service. The primary caveat is that this is a small regional bank with limited digital infrastructure and product visibility—customers should contact the bank directly to confirm service availability and obtain detailed rate and fee information before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Lake View, IA Farmers State Bank at 401 Main St offers banking services to the local community.
